name: local-git-mcp
description: Local MCP server for querying git branch activity by Jira ticket ID

scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const f='dist/cli.js'; const c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'); if(!c.startsWith('#!/')) fs.writeFileSync(f,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+c); fs.chmodSync(f,0o755);"
